pages.text_excerpt: Community and Environmental Issues - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Need help with community and environmental issues? Scroll to find out about how I can help Please note that many agencies and organisations have formal complaints and appeals processes. I cannot intervene or help until these channels have been exhausted. I am unable to intervene in situations where there is an ongoing police investigation or judicial process apart from assisting constituents (where possible) to obtain legal advice and representation. No information or suggestions received from my team should be treated as formal legal or specialist advice. How I can help: Raise matters which impact York Outer on your behalf in the House of Commons. Contact relevant departments or officials on your behalf to help with enquiries or complaints. Write to Secretaries of State or Ministers regarding relevant issues once all other channels of enquiry have been exhausted. What I can't do: I cannot help in settling disputes between family members, neighbours or between yourself and an employer. I cannot involve myself in legal processes or active police investigations or contest decisions made in a court of law. Provide financial or business advice. Priority contacts These organisations can help with a range of issues. City of York Council Complaints Team Email address [email protected] Address West Offices, Station Rise, York, YO1 6GA Phone Number 01904 554145 Visit website Joseph Rowntree Housing Trust Email address [email protected] Address Feedback Team, JRHT, The Garth, White Rose Avenue, New Earswick, York, YO32 4TZ Phone Number 0800 587 0211 Visit website North Yorkshire Police Address Complaints and Recognition Team, Office of the North Yorkshire Police, Fire and Crime Commissioner, Harrogate Police Station, Beckwith Head Rd, Harrogate, HG3 1FR Phone Number 101 Visit website City of York Council Complaints Team Email address [email protected] Address West Offices, Station Rise, York, YO1 6GA Phone number 01904 554145 Visit website Joseph Rowntree Housing Trust Email address [email protected] Address Feedback Team, JRHT, The Garth, White Rose Avenue, New Earswick, York, YO32 4TZ Phone number 0800 587 0211 Visit website North Yorkshire Police Address Complaints and Recognition Team, Office of the North Yorkshire Police, Fire and Crime Commissioner, Harrogate Police Station, Beckwith Head Rd, Harrogate, HG3 1FR Phone number 101 Visit website Need to discuss your situation with me? My team are available to review your situation and see what I can do to assist your matter. Fill in this form to get in touch Description Please feel free to provide us with a copy of any relevant documentation. Upload up to 3 files, max file size 2MB. pages.text_excerpt: Parliamentary and Policy Issues - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Need help with parliamentary and policy issues? Scroll to find out about how I can help I am keen to hear the views of constituents on all topics and issues. I read every email I receive from constituents and in an ideal world would like to be able to reply to them all individually, unfortunately limited time and resources mean that this is not always possible. How I can help: Speak in Parliament on issues that matter to York Outer. Lend my support by writing to Government Departments and Ministers. Writing to organisations advocating for the people of York Outer. What I can't do: Given the wide diversity of views in York Outer I won't always be able to offer my support on the issues that matter to you. Given the amount of correspondence I receive and the wide variety of issues raised I am not always able to reply. Priority contacts These organisations can help with a range of issues. York Outer Constituency Office Email address [email protected] Visit website York Outer Constituency Office Email address [email protected] Visit website Need to discuss your situation with me? My team are available to review your situation and see what I can do to assist your matter. pages.meta_description: About me Your Member of Parliament for York Outer. I am incredibly proud to be your Member of Parliament for York Outer, my home and it's where I live with my wife and two young sons.As your MP, I have been working hard on the issues that matter to you…

pages.text_excerpt: About Me - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram About me Your Member of Parliament for York Outer. I am incredibly proud to be your Member of Parliament for York Outer, my home and it’s where I live with my wife and two young sons. As your MP, I have been working hard on the issues that matter to you the most and I’m dedicated to service for York Outer. Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Biography I was born and brought up in York Outer and attended Huntington School. I studied Politics, Philosophy and Economics at Oxford University and went on to do a Masters Degree in Political Science in Chicago. The first two years of my career were spent at the Bank of England where I worked on a number of projects (including the introduction of plastic bank notes). I then went to work in the compliance function of a fast growing Fintech business. I live in York Outer with my wife, two sons and our cats and dog. I was elected to be the MP for York Outer in 2024 having first contested the seat in 2017. I’m proud to represent the area where I was brought up, and where I live, in Parliament. As your MP I will be working hard to make York Outer an even better place to live, study and work. pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Contact Scroll to find out about how I can help you Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own, York Outer, constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here Here’s how I can help you: As your MP I can help with a variety of issues and concerns. First steps Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Outside Parliament Outside Parliament, you can request that I speak at an event concerning your issue, pledge my support to a campaign or write to the local media on your behalf. Friday 21st November Time 12:30 - 13:30 - Online Due to security reasons, I cannot advertise the location of my advice surgeries in advance. Those given a slot will be given the location. I rotate my surgeries around the constituency to cover all of our communities. My next surgery: Book an appointment I hold monthly advice surgeries, rotating around the constituency. They are by appointment only. To make an appointment please send an email using the contact form. Fill in this form to get in touch Description Organiser First Line of Address Postcode Mobile Email Address Submit form Get in contact my office: Email address [email protected] Address PO Box. 894, York, YO31 6HP Phone Number 01904 463 444 Meetings & Events I enjoy visiting local groups, organisations, businesses and schools in York Outer. Please consider inviting me to your meeting or event, but understand that it will not always be possible, due to my parliamentary and other commitments. pages.title: Small Business Survey - Luke Charters MP for York Outer
pages.meta_description: I am asking businesses in York Outer to complete a short survey so that I can learn more about the issues that you are facing. I am particularly interested in the use of banking and cash services in York Outer and whether the closure of high street banks has had…
pages.text_excerpt: Small Business Survey - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Small Business Survey I am asking businesses in York Outer to complete a short survey so that I can learn more about the issues that you are facing. I am particularly interested in the use of banking and cash services in York Outer and whether the closure of high street banks has had an impact on your business. You would also be welcome to email me ( [email protected] ), if there is a more complex issue that I may be able to help with or if you wish to provide more detail to your survey response. I’m lucky to have so many amazing small businesses in my constituency. However, I know that it is not always easy running a business especially after lockdowns and a cost-of-living crisis. This survey is my opportunity to learn more about your business and hopefully how I can help it. Name of Business Email Address What banking facilities do you currently use? (select all that apply) Free ATMs (cash machines) Paid ATMs (cash machines) Bank branches Post offices Other (please state) If you use a banking branch or post office where is it located? How important are cash payments to your business? Very Important Important Not important Not applicable Other (please state) Are there any challenges that you are you facing due to lack of access to facilities such as banking branches? Do you consent to being contact by the office of Luke Charters MP regarding the contents of this survey Yes No Do you want to hear more from Luke Charters MP regarding local news, events, and campaigns? Yes No Data Processing Permission I agree to Luke Charters MP using the information I have provided and using it to understand what issues are most relevant to me and to contact me about events and other activities. I understand I can opt out from communication at any time.
